reviews.review_description:
Fantastic so far!

Hope it’s a full release!

Come on developers? Any kind of update would appreciated.

Highly recommend!

UPDATE:- It's been 4 months since I played the demo and 6 months since this demo released...
Half a year later and I can't even find info on this game ever actually releasing in full on Quest at ANY point in the future.
Did the game get cancelled or something?  Because I'd hate if a seemingly amazing title like this never gets released, leaving nothing but this huge tease of a demo to play of it..



OG:- The demo was a blast to play and very polished overall. I enjoyed the grapple mechanic and it felt good to use. The platforming, small stealth sections, and the puzzle/s were all great, and all of it just challenging enough to make you pay attention/ think without holding you up or frustrating (though it is just the very literal beginning as well) and I just enjoyed finding and collecting ss much as I could.
The graphics were also very crisp and clean, with an eye pleasing cartoon-ish art style reminiscent of the Sly Cooper series (from what I remember anyway. It's been 20 years..😅). The sound design was fine with no discernable issues that stuck out and the music fitting and wel done.

The only small issue I noticed was the picture book 2D cutscene and zero voice overs, which took me out of what could've possibly been an endearing animated cutscene (even if still 2D). On top of that, said picture book cutscene went on too long considering the presentation that already doesn't translate that well in a VR setting. 
I can understand if it's a budget and/or resource constraint, and I don't hold it against the very fun demo. It's just not something I particularly liked (luckily there is the option to Skip for those who don't care to miss out on character/ story beats, though I sadly do care..😅).
But outside of that and the screen fading to black way to often because my head (front or back..)was just slightly close to doors, walls, or objects sticking out at my head level; I loved everything in the demo!
I would love to get the full game, so I can't wait to hear about a full release. Will definitely purchase day 1!

reviews.review_title: You guys need to play this!
reviews.review_description:
As a huge fan of the Sly Cooper series, it was sad to see Playstation abandon the series with no news of Sly 5 in over a decade since Sly 4 launched on the PS3 and PS Vita.

This games music was reminiscent of the first Sly Cooper game, the pickpocket mechanic works great as well. I also like how the guards come running when they hear any sounds you make. 

The gameplay and movement is so smooth, I would be able to play this game for hours, and it is such a relief to see a fellow fan of the series creating a game in VR inspired by my  favorite childhood video game series.

Some of the elements of this game reminded me of Spyro the Dragon and Jak and Daxter from a design and art style perspective as well as Ratchet and Clank with the sling shot game mechanic.

Anyone reading this review, you don’t need to read any more. This game is very fun to play and better than many other VR games I have tried out. 

Please support the development and release of this game. I know I’m very excited to play it once it’s finished. 

:)

there isn’t more to play at the moment! 😜 I enjoyed this game so much that I played the demo twice. Hungry for more! Definitely getting the full version upon release! Great job, dev team! I posted a demo gameplay video for reference on YT @misschiefvr

reviews.review_title: Why r there no reviews on this yet??
reviews.review_description: Hello this is best demo I've played in a long hot minute so exciting controls seamless so cute and fun very confused on why no reviews but idc just tell me when released I will pre order this game reminds me of cookie run but actually wayyyyyy better. Sorry devs on that but both great but this whole new level can't wait for more!!
